subcodes.first_line: Whensoever God willeth that He manifest Himself in truth, verily this is best for Us and for such of His servants as draw nigh unto Him, and He, verily, is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کلما اراد الله انه یظهر بالحق و انه خیر لنا و للمقربین من عباده و انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @justice and wrath of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
